progress: v3 killed numerals (4/4 clean) and goalposts (4/4 clean this round). Remaining modes: concrete strips inside the oval, doubled boundaries, scattered bleacher props, clipped track ring, invented buildings.
resubmit_guidance: Prompt v4 (judge's five changes, all applied): grass+white-paint-only inside the oval; exactly one line per boundary with nothing parallel; bleachers straight rows outside the track aligned same direction; camera pulled back with grass margin on all four sides, nothing clipped; no buildings/press boxes/sheds/parking lots inside the fence line. Escalation rule from session: if attempt 4 (v4) also all-fails, STOP iterating and surface best candidates to the user for red-pen.
